title: Text arrays not escaped when serialized to text
description:
### What happens?

When a text array is serialized to text (e.g. during CSV write), the strings are not escaped, which means the serialized string cannot be coherently deserialized.

### To Reproduce

```sql
select ['a,c', 'b']::text as arr;
```
```text
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   arr    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ varchar  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ [a,c, b] в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```
```sql
select len(['a,c', 'b']) as before, len(['a,c', 'b']::text::text[]) as after;
```
```text
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ before в”Ӯ after в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ int64  в”Ӯ int64 в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ      2 в”Ӯ     3 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

poc: select len(['a,c', 'b']) as before, len(['a,c', 'b']::text::text[]) as after;
select '''' || list_reduce(['a,c', 'b'], (x, y) -> x || ''', ''' || y) || '''' as arr;
key_bug_features: Text arrays not escaped during serialization to text
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, arr TEXT[] NOT NULL);
SELECT arr, len(arr) AS arr_length FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT '''' || list_reduce(arr, (x, y) -> x || ''', ''' || y) || '''' AS escaped_arr FROM test_table;
SELECT len(['hello, world']) AS before, len(['hello, world']::text::text[]) AS after;
